app.title: Rezeptor — v{version}
app.footer_update_tip: Click to open the update dialog

menu.refresh_tip: Refresh install status of all recipes via validate.sh (also runs after install/repair and on startup).

tooltip.install: First-time install of the selected recipe
tooltip.repair: Check for gaps and restore missing pieces
tooltip.kill: Quit running Wine/app processes for this recipe

status.installed_wiso: Installed — “Launch” or “Repair”; portable path under More ▾
status.gpu_experiment: GPU experiment active — Launch possible; on failure: scripts/photoshop-gpu-profile.sh stable
status.window_soon: Window appears in a few seconds…

trust.title: Rezeptor files outdated
trust.hint_dev: As a developer: run “Regenerate manifest”, then refresh status.
trust.hint_user: Please update Rezeptor (Help → Check for updates).

update.none_body: Version v{current} is up to date{latest_hint}.

settings.title: Settings
settings.intro:
Logs are stored under ~/.local/share/wine-software/logs/
Old files are removed on startup (optional).
settings.saved: Settings saved — logs: {days} days, max. {files} files

dialog.about_body:
Tested Wine recipes — Install, Launch, Validate, Repair.

Project: github.com/{repo}

License: GPL-2.0

Copyright © 2024–2026 Sunny C.
dialog.version_help:
Recipes guarantee install and launch only with the stated, tested version.

• Tested version: verified by the recipe author
• Custom/other versions: may work, but are untested and unsupported
• Issues with other versions come from the version choice, not the recipe

Use the version documented by the recipe for a guaranteed install.
dialog.wine_dialogs_body:
Wine windows may appear during install/repair.

Rezeptor tells you in the step which window is next:

• “Wine Mono installer” → Install (do not Cancel)
• “Updating Wine configuration” → OK or wait

The current action is shown under Steps and in the progress line.
dialog.wine_dialogs_activity: Wine windows may appear briefly — click OK or Install.
dialog.failure_info: See log files. Issues can be reported on GitHub.
dialog.report_confirm:
Create a sanitized log report and open a GitHub issue?

(Paths/emails are anonymized)
dialog.report_opened_body:
The issue form uses the official bug template.

1. In the browser: briefly fill in “Problem” and “Actual behavior”
2. Logs are already formatted — paste with Ctrl+V into “📸 Logs”

Report file: {name}
dialog.install_reconfirm:
“{name}” is already set up.

Choose source/target again and run installation?
(Wine prefix stays; portable can be copied to a new target folder.)
dialog.repair_wiso:
Repair runs validate.sh and fixes:
• Portable root / launch script
• vcrun2019, gdiplus, dotnet48 (Wine Mono), win10

Wine windows may appear briefly — click OK or Install.

Continue?
dialog.repair_default:
Repair runs validate.sh and fixes:
• Native MSXML
• Fonts (ClearType/Segoe UI)
• Proton-GE graphics DLLs
• Desktop icon

Continue?
dialog.launch_already: “{name}” was already running (possibly hidden) — Quit, then Launch again
dialog.launch_tips_wiso:
Rezeptor → WISO → Repair (sets wined3d + Qt launch fix).
First start can take 10–20 s — check the Log tab.
Linux internet stays active; only one WISO Qt plugin is disabled.
dialog.launch_tips_default: Quit → Launch again, or Repair. Check the Log tab.

source.title: Choose source
source.label: Source
source.wiso_hint:
1. Source: extracted folder or archive (zip/tar.gz)
2. Target: install folder — Rezeptor extracts/copies there
3. Then: Patch.exe, Wine prefix, desktop icon, launch via start.exe
source.target_hint: Target: click a folder in the list or type a path (may be new — created on install).
source.portable_ph: Folder for the installed portable version
source.version_unknown: Version not detected — may differ from the tested version.
source.need_source: Please choose a source (folder or archive).
source.need_fix: A fix package is required for this recipe.
source.need_target: Please choose a target folder for installation.

overview.hint: Description and requirements for the selected recipe.

wizard.title: New recipe
wizard.intro: Creates a recipe folder from the template (new-recipe.sh), runs recipe-lint, and updates the manifest.
wizard.name: Display name
wizard.done: Recipe “{id}” created. Folder opened — edit recipe.yml.
wizard.lint_fail: Recipe created, but recipe-lint reported errors — please check.
wizard.err_id: Enter a valid recipe ID (e.g. my-app).
wizard.blocked:
Recipe development needs a Git clone of the repository (writable recipes/ folder).

AppImage/release builds are for running only.

Clone the repo, run ./setup.sh, then: Rezeptor → New recipe…

docs.intro: Build Rezeptor recipes — local files from the repository. Online version on GitHub (branch main).
